tools.name: client.registerClient
tools.description: Registers a client with IAM Identity Center. This allows clients to initiate device authorization. The output should be persisted for reuse through many authentication requests.

tools.name: deviceAuthorization.startDeviceAuthorization
tools.description: Initiates device authorization by requesting a pair of verification codes from the authorization service.

tools.name: token.createToken
tools.description: Creates and returns an access token for the authorized client. The access token issued will be used to fetch short-term credentials for the assigned roles in the AWS account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
